title: Palantir and NVIDIA just teamed up on a sovereign AI reference stack
summary: Palantir announced a sovereign AI operating-system reference architecture with NVIDIA aimed at customers that need on-premise, edge, or sovereign-cloud control over models, data, and deployment. The stack pairs Palantir’s AIP/Foundry/Apollo/Rubix layer with NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra systems and networking, positioning the offer as a turnkey AI datacenter blueprint rather than a point integration.
